name: magicpath
description: Give Codex a multiplayer canvas for your code with MagicPath.

interface.shortDescription: Give Codex a multiplayer canvas for your code
interface.longDescription: MagicPath gives Codex a multiplayer canvas connected to your codebase. Bring existing UI into the canvas, build interactive designs and component libraries, apply your design system, and ship the result back into production code.
defaultPrompt: Build an interactive dashboard in MagicPath
Bring the sidebar from my repo into MagicPath
Create a component library in MagicPath
